subcodes.first_line: The All-Merciful hath come with the proof, and the Dove of Utterance hath warbled upon the branches: "There is none other God but Me." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الرحمن بالبرهان و غنت حمامه البیان علی الافنان انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @the power of words; of speech
